title: King's Bounty: The Legend
notes: Very poor performance. Sub 20 fps during battles on mid and low settings @ 1080p. Dips to 10 fps and lower during battle animations/effects. Steam overlay does not display properly.

title: King's Bounty: The Legend
notes: It runs, but performance is horrible ~10fps

To fix invisible hero, I had to edit registry as described here: https://appdb.winehq.org/objectManager.php?sClass=version&iId=19045&iTestingId=96626
But FPS is very low, it's uncomfortable to play.

gpu: X.Org Radeon RX Vega (VEGA10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.11-gentoo, LLVM 7.0.0)
notes: FPS below 10, otherwise it works (Steam Overlay, ...)
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: Didnt check the FPS but it seemed quite fluid to me.
title: King's Bounty: The Legend

notes: overworld runs fine, but in battle FPS drops to 5-10 and especially animations with a lot of particle effects slow game to 1-2 FPS, it also slows the entire game so you often have to wait 30 seconds for each animation to finish before you can act with next unit, this makes the game almost unplayable.
